summary: Surah Al-Isra highlights the Night Journey of Prophet Muhammad, the guidance of the Qur’an, and the consequences of good and evil. It emphasizes monotheism, kindness to parents, justice, charity, and personal responsibility. The surah warns against arrogance, wastefulness, and disbelief, and recounts the destinies of previous nations. It stresses the importance of prayer, patience, and trust in Allah, and reminds of the certainty of resurrection and accountability.
